ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the property location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the property location */,
  "price_per_square_py" REAL /* Price per square meter of the property */,
  "py" INTEGER /* Total area of the property in square meters */,
  "apt_code" TEXT /* Apartment code for identification */,
  "dist_from_station" REAL /* Distance from the nearest station in meters */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., apartment, house, condo) */,
  "num_bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms */,
  "num_bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of amenities (e.g., pool, gym, parking) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the property (e.g., available, sold, rented) */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to link to the managing agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Full name of the agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the agent */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the agent */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the agency the agent is associated with */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* Agent's license number */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the agent joined the agency */,
  "sales_performance" REAL /* Performance metric based on sales */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the real estate agency */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the agency */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the agency */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the agency */,
  "website" TEXT /* Agency's website URL */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Full name of the client */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the client */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the client */,
  "preferred_contact" TEXT /* Preferred contact method (e.g., email, phone) */,
  "budget_range" TEXT /* Client's budget range (e.g., $100k-$200k) */,
  "interests" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of client's interests (e.g., downtown, schools) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property involved in the transaction */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent managing the transaction */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction took place */,
  "transaction_amount" REAL /* Amount involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., sale, rent) */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission earned from the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property view event */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being viewed */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client viewing the property */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date when the property was viewed */,
  "view_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the property view in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_views_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_views_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being reviewed */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the client (1 to 5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the client */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was submitted */,
  "response" TEXT /* Agent's response to the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "total_properties" INTEGER /* Total number of properties listed */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average price of properties listed */,
  "highest_price" REAL /* Highest price among listed properties */,
  "lowest_price" REAL /* Lowest price among listed properties */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the analytics data was recorded */,
  "median_price" REAL /* Median price of properties listed */,
  "num_sales" INTEGER /* Number of sales in the period */,
  "num_rentals" INTEGER /* Number of rentals in the period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id")
)
